name: Rating
searchText: rating pick and display rating @mantine/core /core/rating allowclear color count defaultvalue emptysymbol fractions fullsymbol getsymbollabel highlightselectedonly name onchange onhover readonly size value

props.name: allowClear
props.description: When true, clicking the same rating value clears the rating to 0, default is false

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any CSS color value, default is 'yellow'

props.name: count
props.description: Number of rating items (stars), default is 5

props.name: emptySymbol
props.description: Icon displayed for unselected rating items. Can be a function that receives the rating value.

props.name: fractions
props.description: Number of fractions each item can be divided into, default is 1

props.name: fullSymbol
props.description: Icon displayed for selected rating items. Can be a function that receives the rating value.

props.name: getSymbolLabel
props.description: Function to generate aria-label for each rating value. Receives the rating value as argument, default is (value) => String(value)

props.name: highlightSelectedOnly
props.description: When true, only the clicked rating item is highlighted, not all items up to the selected value, default is false

props.name: name
props.description: Name attribute for form submission. If not provided, a unique id will be generated.

props.name: onHover
props.description: Called when rating item is hovered. Receives -1 when hover ends.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: When true, rating cannot be changed by user interaction, default is false
